comment: Loa E-code discipline applied to poteau. Each: code, name, what, fix.

P101.name: packet_missing
P101.what: Stop attempted in an armed run with no handoff packet.
P101.fix: Emit .run/poteau/packet.json (verdict, rationale, task_ref, conformance), then stop again.

P102.name: packet_field_missing
P102.what: Required handoff field absent (three-tier: required fails closed).
P102.fix: Add the named field; recommended fields warn, required fields refuse.

P201.name: task_ref_mismatch
P201.what: Packet does not reference the armed task (issue #29: gate judged coherence, not conformance).
P201.fix: Copy run_state task_ref into packet.task_ref; verdict must compare work AGAINST THE TASK.

P202.name: conformance_unasserted
P202.fix: Set packet.conformance.in_scope=true with a one-line scope note, or verdict CHANGES_REQUIRED.

P203.name: grounding_unproven
P203.what: Mandated read left no echo in the rationale (issue #31: 0/4 reads honored).
P203.fix: Open the rationale with the literal H1 of each mandated read; a read with no echo is presumed unread.

P204.name: council_downgraded
P204.what: Mandated council surface arrived with fewer voices than required (issue #30).
P204.fix: Attach >=min_voices distinct council receipts or route via the council runner. Single-model on this surface is forbidden.

P301.name: unhonorable_mandate
P301.what: Manifest mandates a council the lattice cannot honor.
P301.fix: Configure gate.council.runner, or pass --allow-single-model to RECORD the downgrade (compile-time fail-closed, issue #30).

P401.name: generated_file_drift
P401.fix: Edit poteau/manifest/poteau.manifest.json and re-run poteau-gen; --force discards drift.

P402.name: protected_path_mutation
P402.what: Run-time mutation targeted hook config / gate state / manifest.
P402.fix: Constitutional changes go through manifest + gen + reviewed commit, never from inside a run.

P500.name: gatekeeper_internal
P500.fix: Custody gates fail CLOSED: fix the assembly (see .run/poteau/gatekeeper.err); POTEAU_BREAK_GLASS=<reason> for sensed emergency release.

P600.name: module_unreadable
P600.what: Module or one of its three manifests failed to resolve/parse.
P600.fix: A module references quest, party, and dungeon by path; all three must resolve. Custody fails closed.

P601.name: party_missing_role
P601.what: Quest requires a role the party does not seat (the cover rule).
P601.fix: Recruit the role or re-quest. The cover says 4-6 characters for a reason.

P602.name: dungeon_missing_tool
P602.what: Quest requires a tool the dungeon does not provision (Daemonheim rule).
P602.fix: Add the veve'd CLI to the dungeon loadout, or pick a dungeon that carries it.

P603.name: council_understaffed
P603.what: Quest mandates a council larger than the party seats (issue #30, at the door).
P603.fix: Add council voices or the ceremony does not start.

P604.name: gate_room_unreachable
P604.what: A quest gate keys to a room absent from the dungeon graph.
P604.fix: Fix the keying — an unreachable gate is an unfinishable quest.

P605.name: rel_mismatch
P605.what: Competitive quest declared against a casual dungeon posture.
P605.fix: Run in a competitive dungeon, or downgrade deliberately and record why.

P606.name: hitl_slot_unseated
P606.what: Quest gate invokes an operator slot the party does not seat.
P606.fix: The operator is a party slot, not ambient magic — add the seat or remove the invocation.
